additions.value: AirlockGate must run before any other skill loads in a session
ledger writes are buffered in memory and flushed once at run end
compiled policy is cached in memory at session start
additions.reason: neutralizes bottlenecks[0] per-action policy lookup cost

additions.value: integration test pins AirlockGate version against skill SDK version

determinism_wins.after: skill returns violation error and run is marked failed in ledger before any side effect

open_issues: Concurrent runs invariant relies on AccentOS single-process — document this dependency explicitly in handoff
